index.title: Index
index.description: Welcome to Croissant, the ultimate platform for sharing and discovering amazing images. Join our community today and start exploring!

hero.title: Welcome to the Croissant Universe
hero.subtitle: Dive into the ultimate gaming universe with a unique immersive experience

description.desktop: Croissant is an open source project where every contribution matters. Join our passionate developer community and help shape the future of gaming.
description.mobile: Croissant is an open source project where every contribution matters. Join our passionate developer community.

carousel.noGames: No games available at the moment.

index.topspan: Creative and Reusable Opensource Inventory System, Scalable, APIful, and Network Technology

players.1: Play games connected to Croissant and collect unique items.
players.2: Trade, buy, or sell your items with other users.
players.3: Join multiplayer games easily using lobbies.
players.4: Manage your inventory and credits via Discord or the launcher.
players.5: Link your Steam account to access your Steam inventory.
players.title: For Players

creators.1: Connect your game to Croissant via SDK or API.
creators.2: Authenticate players and interact with their inventory (add/remove items, rewards, in-game purchases).
creators.3: Create and sell your own items or bundles in the marketplace.
creators.4: Use lobbies to manage private multiplayer sessions.
creators.5: Use OAuth2 as authentication on your website.
creators.6: Users can now link their Steam accounts. If you decide to make your game on Steam, you can find a user by their Steam ID and recover their inventory.
creators.title: For Creators & Game Developers
creators.getstarted: Get started: Generate your API key with settings and see the documentation.

marketplace.2: Browse and purchase new items or bundles.
marketplace.3: Transfer items or credits to friends.
marketplace.title: Marketplace & Inventory

lobby.2: Invite friends with a lobby link.
lobby.3: See who's in your lobby and interact in real time.
lobby.title: Lobby System

safety.1: Your security is our priority. Never share your account or API key. Always double-check trade details before confirming. For help, use /support or join our support server.
safety.title: Safety & Support

oauth2.1: You can now try out Croissant's OAuth2 integration on the /oauth2/test page.
oauth2.2: This system allows you to securely connect your website or application to Croissant, authenticate users, and access their inventories.
oauth2.3: Simple and secure authentication via OAuth2.
oauth2.4: Allows access to a user's Croissant inventory.
oauth2.5: Easy to integrate for game or website developers.
oauth2.title: Test OAuth2 (new!)

whoami.1: Hi, my name is Fox, a.k.a fox3000foxy on socials. I'm a French developer passionate about coding and creating innovative solutions. I am the creator of the Croissant Inventory System.
whoami.title: Who am I?

system.1: The idea of Croissant Inventory System was to be a second-hand items marketplace crafted for gamers and creators. My platform not only allows players to exchange in-game items but also empowers creators to monetize their creations by selling items and cosmetics without any fees. This approach challenges the ultra-expensive marketplaces by providing a fair and accessible platform for all.
system.2: I am committed to giving items a second life, enabling seamless trading, buying, and selling of pre-owned items. This promotes sustainability and fosters a dynamic marketplace environment where gamers can benefit from each other's inventories.
system.3: Importantly, players do not need to be familiar with the bot or even have a Discord account to enjoy the benefits of my system. The Croissant Inventory System is designed to be user-friendly and accessible to all.
system.title: The Croissant Inventory System

api.1: I'm actively working on maintaining the API and the Discord bot to ensure they are stable and robust, minimizing the risk of bugs. The Discord bot, which facilitates inventory management and trading, is already available. You can explore it here.
api.title: API & Discord Bot

philosophy.1: Like Vinted, the Croissant Inventory System was thinked to be an user-to-user marketplace. I'm working on it to make it as easy as possible to use for users, but also for creators.
philosophy.2: As both a gamer and developer, I've always dreamed of a marketplace that truly understands the gaming community's needs. That's why I built Croissant to be more than just a trading platform - it's a vibrant ecosystem where gaming items find new life and creators can thrive.
philosophy.title: Marketplace Philosophy

gamers.1: For gamers, I've witnessed firsthand how frustrating it can be to have valuable items sitting unused in your inventory. With Croissant, you can now turn these dormant assets into opportunities. Imagine finding that rare skin you've been hunting for months, or finally completing your collection by trading with someone across the globe. The possibilities are endless, and the best part? It's all happening in a secure, user-friendly environment.
gamers.title: For Gamers

creators.1: To my fellow creators out there - I understand the challenge of monetizing your creative work in a market dominated by high commission rates. That's why Croissant stands apart with our zero-fee policy. You pour your heart into designing unique items, and I believe you should keep every penny you earn. Whether you're creating custom skins, special items, or entire collections, Croissant gives you the platform to reach players directly and build your own community.
creators.title: For Creators

simplicity.1: The magic of Croissant lies in its simplicity. You don't need to be a tech expert or even have a Discord account to get started as an user. I've designed the system to be as intuitive as possible, while still offering powerful features for those who want to dive deeper. From casual traders to serious collectors, from indie creators to established developers - there's a place for everyone in our ecosystem.
simplicity.title: Simplicity & Accessibility

future.1: Looking ahead, I'm incredibly excited about the future of Croissant. We're working on features like cross-game trading, enhanced creator tools, and community events that will make the platform even more dynamic. Imagine being able to trade items across different games, or participating in special marketplace events where rare items become available. These aren't just plans - they're promises I'm committed to delivering.
future.title: The Future

community.1: But what truly makes Croissant special is our community. Every day, I see players helping each other find items, creators sharing tips and resources, and new friendships forming through trades. It's more than just a marketplace - it's a growing family of gamers and creators who share a passion for gaming and fair trading.
community.title: Community

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.intro: You will find the API documentation below.
apiDocs.requiresAuth: Requires authentication via headers Authorization: "Bearer [token]" (use /api-key command on Discord to generate your API key)
apiDocs.splashHash: - splashHash is now deprecated and will be removed in the future.
apiDocs.hashes: - Both hashes can be used to construct URLs for fetching the respective assets icons.

badges.title: Croissant - Badges
badges.intro: Badges are special distinctions displayed on your Croissant profile. They reflect your engagement, contributions, or role in the community.

early_user.label: Early User
early_user.description: Awarded to users who registered during the beta period.
early_user.how: This badge is no longer awarded. It was reserved for the first members of the community.

staff.label: Staff
staff.description: Given to administrators of the official Croissant Discord server.
staff.how: Be a member of the Discord administration team.

bug_hunter.label: Bug Hunter
bug_hunter.description: Rewards users who reported a security vulnerability or critical bug.
bug_hunter.how: Report a security vulnerability or major bug to the Croissant team.

contributor.label: Contributor
contributor.description: Awarded to contributors who participated in Croissant's development.
contributor.how: Have a pull request accepted on one of Croissant's GitHub repositories.

moderator.label: Moderator
moderator.how: Be appointed as a moderator on the official Croissant Discord.

community_manager.label: Community Manager
community_manager.description: Rewards members who help grow the community.
community_manager.how: Refer a new person who lists you as their sponsor during registration (the sponsor must not be an alternate account).

partner.label: Partner
partner.how: Establish an official partnership with Croissant, including a Croissant integration on the partner's site or platform.

1.1: 1.1. Discord Information: When you use our Discord bot, we collect your Discord user ID and username for account identification and service functionality.
1.2: 1.2. API Usage: For developers using our API, we collect API key usage data and related transaction information.
1.3: 1.3. Inventory Data: We store information about your virtual items, credits, and trading history.

2.1: 2.1. Service Operation: We use collected data to manage your inventory, process trades, and maintain item ownership records.
2.2: 2.2. API Access: Developer API keys are used to authenticate requests and ensure secure access to our services.
2.3: 2.3. Analytics: We analyze usage patterns to improve our services and prevent abuse.

3.1: 3.1. Public Information: Item ownership and trading history may be visible to other users through our leaderboard system.
3.2: 3.2. API Integration: When you use games integrated with our API, necessary inventory data is shared with those games.
3.3: 3.3. API Data Access: Some non-sensitive data is accessible through our API for integrated services.

4.1: 4.1. We implement security measures to protect your information, including secure API key generation and storage.
4.2: 4.2. API keys are not stored in our database to ensure maximum security.

5.1: 5.1. You can view your data using the /inventory command.
5.2: 5.2. You can delete items you own using the /delete-item command.
5.3: 5.3. You may request deletion of your account data by contacting our support team.

6.1: 6.1. We may update this policy as our services evolve. Significant changes will be announced through our Discord bot.

privacy.title: Croissant - Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to Croissant! This Privacy Policy outlines how we handle your information when you use our inventory system services, including our Discord bot, API, and web interface.

1.1: 1.1. Our services are provided free of charge and are intended for managing virtual items in games.
1.2: 1.2. You must use our services in accordance with Discord's Terms of Service when using our bot.

2.1: 2.1. Users can create and customize their own items using launcher.
2.2: 2.2. Item creators receive 75% of the sale price when their items are sold.
2.3: 2.3. We reserve the right to remove inappropriate or offensive items.

3.1: 3.1. All trades must be confirmed by both parties to be completed.
3.2: 3.2. Users are responsible for verifying trade details before confirmation.
3.3: 3.3. Virtual items and credits have no real-world monetary value. Credits can be converted into real life money by contacting us to make a cooperation operation.

4.1: 4.1. API keys must be obtained through the /api-key command.
4.2: 4.2. Developers must ensure secure handling of API keys.
4.3: 4.3. We reserve the right to revoke API access for misuse.

5.1: 5.1. Exploiting bugs or vulnerabilities in our systems.
5.2: 5.2. Creating automated bots to interact with our services.
5.3: 5.3. Selling or trading items for real-world currency.

6.1: 6.1. We may modify or discontinue services at any time.
6.2: 6.2. Major changes will be announced through our Discord bot.

tos.title: Croissant - Terms of Service
tos.intro: Welcome to Croissant! These Terms of Service govern your use of our inventory system, including our Discord bot, API, and web interface.
